metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_376
metadata.comment:
Rationale: CtBP1 can shuttle between presynaptic boutons and the neuronal nucleus. In the presynapse CtBP1 can be bound to Bassoon and/or Piccolo (Fig. 6) and be released in a activity-dependent manner. In the nucleus CtBP1 can be involved in various transcription regulating and chromatin modifying processes (reviewed in Chinnadurai PMID 17336131).. Experimental description: Primary hippocampal cultures from rats and cultures from rat cortex neurons were prepared as described earlier... p. 1073

29/3/2017 Pim:
Authors use a mix of rat and mouse tissues for their experiments. CTB1 overexpression constructs are rat species. Ctb1 location is primarily studied in rat tissue. Functions of Bsn and Pclo on Ctb1 are studied in a mouse context (KO animals).
Fig.3 uses overexpressed rat CtBP1 and therefore annotation is made against rat species.
